query:
-- Check failed pipeline run details
SELECT id, status, feedErrors, contactsEnriched, apolloCreditsUsed, startedAt, completedAt
FROM pipelineRuns
ORDER BY startedAt DESC
LIMIT 6;

-- Check reps without a userProfile (blocking digest)
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
  up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'user'
ORDER BY u.name;

SELECT id, status, feedErrors, contactsEnriched, apolloCreditsUsed, startedAt, completedAt
FROM pipelineRuns

-- Check reps without a userProfile (blocking digest)
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
  up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'user'
ORDER BY u.name;
